steps.title: Use two table values
steps.content:
From the table, $g(1)=32$ and $g(2)=28$. Since $g(x)=mx+b$, these give
$$32=m+b$$
$$28=2m+b$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second to get $m=-4$. Substitute into $32=m+b$.
$$32=-4+b$$
$$b=36$$
The answer is D.
